description: Letter from the widow of the cantor Ben Nahman to a Gaon concerning the difficulties she is having with the son of her late husband and his sister over her right to domicile in the house to which she has a claim. Cf. T-S 13J13.6 (subsequent plea, two months later, from the same woman), also T-S Ar.18(1).107.
tags: Women's letters, Petition, 12th c, communal, domicile
description_he: מכתב מאלמנת החזן בן נחמן לגאון. על סכסוך עם בן בעלה המנוח ואחותו בנוגע לזכות מגוריה בבית שיש לה עליו תביעה.
